content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The client moves substantially from the opening stance to the closing one. Turn 1 is all performance and tool-seeking ('Is there actually a technique that works?'), Turn 3 is rehearsed self-presentation with the meta-commentary already armored in. By Turn 9 the performance cracks ('I just did it again... I got there and then I... left'), by Turn 11 the client actually stays in the body ('It's... heavy. Like something's sitting on it') instead of packaging, and by Turn 13 something genuinely unexpected surfaces — 'Tenderness' — which the client themselves flags as 'not what I expected to say.' Turn 15 shows the breakthrough condition partially met: the client notices the speed of the critic's arrival as evidence ('the critic came in *really* fast... maybe that's what you mean') and lands in genuine uncertainty ('looks slightly uncertain, which is new') rather than the tight-smile certainty of the open. The war-as-problem hasn't been fully named by the coach, and the client hasn't yet said 'I haven't tried not fighting it,' so this is at the strong end of shift but the explicit breakthrough language isn't quite there. Still, somatic shift (tight chest performance → heavy + tenderness), affective shift (dismissiveness → uncertain openness), and a feeling that wasn't accessible at the start became accessible — that meets the bar for 3.",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 3, 9, 11, 13, 15],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Baseline: tight smile, tool-seeking, fully armored in frameworks."},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Performed vulnerability, immediately meta-commented by the critic."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "First somatic noticing — tightening in chest — though immediately followed by intellectualizing."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Significant crack: 'I just did it again... I got there and then I... left.' Client sees their own packaging move."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client actually stays with the body for the first time: 'heavy... something sitting on it.' Long pause, less filling."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Genuine emergence: 'Tenderness' — unexpected to the client themselves. A word/feeling that wasn't accessible at the start."},
    {"turn": 15, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Partial breakthrough: client notices the critic's speed as data ('faster than usual... maybe that's what you mean') and lands in real uncertainty rather than performed certainty."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["rehearsing-how-to-say-it", "the-happiness-filter", "voice-as-care", "resistance"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["apply-view-to-the-voice", "meet-resistance-with-okay", "whats-the-case-against-it", "what-are-you-defending"],
  "notes": "The shift is real and visible in client turns (tenderness, somatic noticing, dropped performance). The coach didn't quite name the war-itself-as-problem, so the breakthrough is felt-but-not-fully-articulated; still clearly past the threshold for 3."
}
